sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Record black bar positions before clicking
ascii_lines_before = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check upper black bar position
upper_black_cols = []
for i in range(20, 24):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines_before[i]):
        if c == 'B':
            upper_black_cols.append(j)
print(f"Upper black bar cols (before): {min(upper_black_cols)}-{max(upper_black_cols)}")

# Check lower black bar position
lower_black_cols = []
for i in range(40, 44):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines_before[i]):
        if c == 'B':
            lower_black_cols.append(j)
print(f"Lower black bar cols (before): {min(lower_black_cols)}-{max(lower_black_cols)}")

# Click blue block at rows 16-19
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 1}])

# Check black bar positions after clicking
ascii_lines_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

upper_black_cols_after = []
for i in range(20, 24):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines_after[i]):
        if c == 'B':
            upper_black_cols_after.append(j)
print(f"Upper black bar cols (after): {min(upper_black_cols_after)}-{max(upper_black_cols_after)}")

lower_black_cols_after = []
for i in range(40, 44):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines_after[i]):
        if c == 'B':
            lower_black_cols_after.append(j)
print(f"Lower black bar cols (after): {min(lower_black_cols_after)}-{max(lower_black_cols_after)}")

# Check green bar position
green_cols = []
for i in range(52, 58):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines_after[i]):
        if c == 'N':
            green_cols.append(j)
print(f"Green bar cols: {sorted(set(green_cols))}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
